message:
feat(agent): add provider resolution diagnostics and ambiguity detection

Introduces structured diagnostics for agent provider resolution so that
callers can understand why a particular provider was selected and whether
the match was ambiguous:

agent_provider.rs:
- New ProviderResolutionSource enum (ProcessName, BinaryName, Slug, AgentType)
- New ProviderResolutionDiagnostics struct with source, input, normalized,
  candidates, selected, and ambiguous fields
- Refactored from_process_name/from_binary_name to collect all matching
  candidates rather than short-circuiting on first match, enabling
  ambiguity detection for overlapping patterns

agent_correlator.rs:
- detect_agent_from_title now collects candidates and logs when no keywords
  match (trace-level) or when multiple candidates match (ambiguity)
- Same pattern: gather all matches, pick most-specific, flag ambiguity

adaptive_radix_tree.rs:
- Minor cleanup (formatting, trait bound adjustments)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
